content.text:
Implemented the DynamoDB Streams persistence fix.

What changed:
- `DynamoDbService` now restores persisted stream metadata during construction after loading persisted items.
- `DynamoDbStreamService` now has `restoreStream(...)`, which rebuilds stream cache entries from persisted `TableDefinition` stream fields.
- Restored streams keep:
  - original stream ARN
  - stream label extracted from ARN
  - table name
  - stream view type
  - enabled/disabled status
  - in-memory records deque initialization

Validation:
- Added a temporary regression test reproducing the restart/rehydration bug.
- Confirmed it failed before the fix: `ListStreams` returned `0`.
- Confirmed it passed after the fix.
- Deleted the temporary test afterward as requested.

Test command used:
```bash
./mvnw clean -Dmaven.compiler.release=21 -Dtest=DynamoDbServiceTest#rehydratesPersistedEnabledStreams test
```

Note:
- The project default is `maven.compiler.release=25`, but the available JDK did not support release 25, so I used release 21 locally to validate the targeted test. No commits were made.
